---
title: "Gallery"
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: auto
---

## My Research

::: {layout="[[1, 1], [1]]"}
![Virginia Institute of Marine Science](img/histologydrawer.jpeg){group="research"}

![Northeastern Marine Science Center](img/nahantview.jpeg){group="research"}

![North Carolina Oyster Reef](img/ncoysterreef.jpeg){group="research"}

:::

::: {layout="[[1, 1], [1]]"}

![Natural History Museum of New Mexico](img/nhmshells.jpeg){group="research"}

![Historic Preserved Oysters](img/ffpeoysters.jpeg){group="research"}

![Tjarno Marine Lab](img/tjarnostar.jpeg){group="research"}

::: {layout="[[1, 1], [1]]"}

![New Hampshire Oyster Reef](img/nhboat.jpeg){group="research"}

![Gulf of Maine](img/maineboat.jpeg){group="research"}

![Shoals Marine Lab](img/shoalssunset.JPG){group="research"}

:::
